name: Health check — baseline
description: Fast endpoint, always 200. Good for establishing a throughput baseline.

name: User lookup — sequential IDs
description: Hits /users/1 through /users/50 in order. Shows sequential variable substitution in the URL.

name: Create order — random product IDs
description: POST with a random variable inside the JSON body. Each request gets a different product_id.

name: Slow endpoint — latency spread
description: Each response takes 200–500 ms. Watch the min/max/avg spread in the summary.

name: Flaky endpoint — error rate
description: Returns 500 ~30% of the time. Demonstrates non-100% success rate reporting.
